title: options-educator-trailer
brief: Cinematic trailer for Options Educator, a trading education app. Opening on a stormy ocean with a golden shaft of light breaking through dark storm clouds at dawn, the arc moves through a mountain canyon at sunrise flooding with golden light, an aerial descent into a glowing city at night with blue and gold towers, close-up confident hands on a mahogany trading desk in warm morning light, a lone mountain climber triumphant at a summit against a blazing sunrise, cascading golden coins falling through a sunlit canyon, an epic golden-hour aerial coastal city flyover, and finally a Milky Way night sky with a lone silhouette on a mountain boulder — constellation trails forming overhead.
global_style: Cinematic 4K anamorphic, blue-teal-gold palette on deep navy backgrounds, dramatic golden-hour accents, shallow depth of field, volumetric light shafts, epic orchestral scale

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Dramatic ocean storm at night, massive dark navy waves crashing against a jagged sea cliff, a single powerful shaft of golden-white light breaks through parting storm clouds above and illuminates the churning white foam below, wide cinematic composition, 35mm anamorphic horizontal lens flares on the shaft of light
scenes.video_prompt: Slow-motion storm waves surge and crash against the cliff in rhythmic pulses, the golden shaft of light widens and intensifies as clouds part overhead, spray explodes upward and catches the light like scattered diamonds, the ocean surface gradually shifts from dark navy toward deep teal
scenes.camera: slow push-in toward the cliff, slightly low angle, 35mm anamorphic
scenes.motion: massive waves rolling in and crashing, foam and spray exploding upward catching light, storm clouds churning and parting, golden shaft of light strengthening and widening
scenes.style: deep navy blue ocean, storm-dark sky cracking to golden dawn, dramatic high-contrast cinematic lighting, anamorphic lens flares on the light shaft
scenes.negative: text, letters, words, writing, numbers, digits, characters, script, subtitles, captions, foreign text, gibberish, watermark, blurry, ugly, deformed

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Aerial view descending into a dramatic narrow mountain canyon at sunrise, sheer golden sandstone walls glowing amber and orange, a deep sapphire blue river winding far below, brilliant white sun rays pouring between the canyon walls from above, wide anamorphic frame
scenes.video_prompt: Camera descends steadily through the canyon from high above, golden light sweeps across the rock walls as the sun rises, the blue river below shimmers and sparkles, shadows retreat as warm light floods downward to the canyon floor
scenes.camera: slow vertical descent through canyon from aerial height, 28mm wide anamorphic
scenes.motion: gentle river current visible far below, light rays sweeping across stone walls as sun rises, fine dust particles drifting in the shafts of light
scenes.style: warm amber-orange canyon walls, deep sapphire blue river, brilliant white morning sun rays, volumetric golden dust in the air
scenes.negative: text, letters, words, writing, numbers, digits, characters, script, subtitles, captions, foreign text, gibberish, watermark, blurry, ugly, deformed

scenes.video_prompt: Camera descends smoothly through the night sky toward the city, towers grow larger, streams of golden vehicle light trails flow through canyons of blue-lit glass buildings, the city pulses with electric energy as the camera approaches
scenes.camera: dramatic aerial descent from high to low altitude, 50mm anamorphic
scenes.motion: continuous camera descent toward the city, vehicle light trails streaming through streets, building windows twinkling and reflecting, cloud wisps passing the camera
scenes.style: electric blue and warm gold city lights against deep navy night sky, glass towers reflecting light, dynamic energetic atmosphere, anamorphic bokeh on distant lights

scenes.motion: sunrise blazing and intensifying, clouds drifting slowly far below, jacket fabric rippling in summit wind, rays of light sweeping outward

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Slow-motion cascade of polished gold coins pouring over the edge of a sunlit stone ledge and falling through warm amber canyon air, caught in a shaft of late-afternoon sunlight, coins glittering and spinning as they fall, wide dramatic 35mm anamorphic shot showing scale of the drop
